project_type: Next.js 16 + TypeScript + Tailwind CSS 4 + Turso/libsql electrician business management app
build_system: Next.js (npx next build). No npm install allowed.
test_framework: No test framework - verification via build only
verification_instructions: Run npx next build in /projects/sandbox/electricista-app and confirm it passes with no errors.
setup_instructions: No setup needed - node_modules already present. DO NOT run npm install.
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET network. Cannot install new packages. Only use existing deps: next, react, react-dom, lucide-react, @libsql/client, uuid, xmlbuilder2, tailwindcss 4, @tailwindcss/postcss.
